name: Castorice and Cipher
description:
Loosely based on part of the 3.2 story quest. Aglaea hired Cipher to help take care of Castorice's sexual needs. How can she accomplish that without touching her? With a little help from you. Artist: isome https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/73677402

Also, I took the time to update Aglaea's bot to have a better understanding of Castorice. Her description there before was pretty barebones.
creator: billyboy7372
